# Personal

> AI agentic wellbeing and healthcare superapp. Health that finally knows you.

Personal combines a continuous AI health companion with a dedicated human GP — the same doctor every time, not a random on-call service. The platform monitors HealthKit, wearables, labs, and EHR data in real-time, detects health trends before they become symptoms, and handles the logistics of healthcare autonomously (appointments, prescriptions, lab orders, insurance). A licensed GP sees the AI-digested patient context before every interaction, enabling continuous primary care at consumer prices.

## What makes Personal different

- **Continuous + dedicated**: The only platform with both always-on AI monitoring AND a dedicated human GP who knows you
- **Agentic**: AI books appointments, refills Rx, orders labs, files insurance claims — without you asking
- **Longitudinal data moat**: Years of HealthKit, wearables, labs, and visit history unified into one health graph
- **Concierge at consumer price**: Same quality as $3K–$10K/year concierge medicine, at consumer subscription prices

## Features

- **Always-on monitoring**: HealthKit, Garmin, Oura, Whoop, Dexcom, labs, EHR — unified health graph
- **Proactive alerts**: AI detects declining trends and notifies your GP automatically
- **Clinical reports**: Professional-grade health summaries, shareable with any provider
- **Agentic actions**: Appointments, Rx refills, lab orders, insurance claims
- **Dedicated GP**: Same licensed doctor every time, async messaging + video
- **Family plan**: One GP who knows your whole family

## Pricing

- **Free**: HealthKit sync, weekly AI summary, health score, 1 clinical report/month
- **Plus** ($9/mo): Real-time alerts, unlimited reports, agentic actions, unlimited AI chat
- **Premium** ($29/mo): Multi-AI consensus, predictive risk modeling, mental health, nutrition AI, GoodRx
- **Care** ($79/mo): Everything in Premium + dedicated licensed GP, unlimited async, 2 video visits/month
- **Family** ($79 base + $35/member): Care for the whole family, shared or separate GPs
- **Access** ($0): Full Premium free for Medicaid, veterans, students, SNAP/WIC, healthcare workers, low-income

## Technology

- iOS-native app (Swift/SwiftUI)
- HealthKit integration (16 data types → FHIR R4)
- FHIR R4 data layer, HIPAA-compliant
- AI synthesis via Claude (Anthropic)
- Telemedicine via HIPAA-compliant video

## Links

- Website: https://personal.g-a-l-a-c-t-i-c.com
- Pricing: https://personal.g-a-l-a-c-t-i-c.com/#pricing
- For providers: https://personal.g-a-l-a-c-t-i-c.com/#providers
